sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ صَابِرٌ مُدَرِّبًا رِيَاضِيًّا فِي نَادٍ.
sentences.translation: Sabir radi kao sportski trener u klubu.
sentences.translationEn: Sabir works as a sports trainer in a club.

sentences.arabic: يُعَلِّمُ الْأَعْضَاءَ تَمَارِينَ مُنَاسِبَةً لِكُلِّ مِنْهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Uči članove odgovarajućim vježbama za svakoga od njih.
sentences.translationEn: He teaches members suitable exercises for each of them.

sentences.translation: Prati njihov napredak i uvijek ih ohrabruje.
sentences.translationEn: He follows their progress and always encourages them.

sentences.arabic: يَشْعُرُ بِسَعَادَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ حِينَ يَتَقَدَّمُ أَحَدُهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Osjeća veliku sreću kad neko od njih napreduje.
sentences.translationEn: He feels great happiness when one of them makes progress.
